code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            evens = list.push(evens, v)
          else
            odds = list.push(odds, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      evens = list.push(evens, v)
    else
      odds = list.push(odds, v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut evens_str = ""
mut first_e = true
for x in evens
  if first_e
    evens_str = "#{x}"
    first_e = false
  else
    evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{x}"
  end
end

mut odds_str = ""
mut first_o = true
for x in odds
  if first_o
    odds_str = "#{x}"
    first_o = false
  else
    odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{x}"
  end
end

print("evens=#{evens_str}")
print("odds=#{odds_str}")
